auth.label: API Key
auth.description: HotspotSystem API key sent with the sn-apikey header.

actions.name: get_current_owner
actions.description: Verify the HotspotSystem API key and return the connected operator account.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading the current HotspotSystem operator.

operator.description: The operator name returned by HotspotSystem.

outputSchema.description: The normalized response returned for the current HotspotSystem operator.

actions.name: list_customers
actions.description: List HotspotSystem customers across all accessible locations.

fields.description: A comma-separated list of HotspotSystem fields to include in the response.

sort.description: One HotspotSystem property name to sort by. Prefix with - for descending order.

limit.description: The page size to request from HotspotSystem.

offset.description: The zero-based offset to request from HotspotSystem.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing HotspotSystem customers or subscribers.

anyOf.description: The user identifier.
The username returned by HotspotSystem.
The full name returned by HotspotSystem.
The email address returned by HotspotSystem.
The company name returned by HotspotSystem.
The street address returned by HotspotSystem.
The city returned by HotspotSystem.
The state or county returned by HotspotSystem.
The postal code returned by HotspotSystem.
The two-letter country code returned by HotspotSystem.
The phone number returned by HotspotSystem.
The social network name returned by HotspotSystem.
The social network identifier returned by HotspotSystem.
The social network username returned by HotspotSystem.
The social profile link returned by HotspotSystem.
The social gender field returned by HotspotSystem.
The social age range field returned by HotspotSystem.
The social followers count field returned by HotspotSystem.
The user creation timestamp returned by HotspotSystem.

items.description: A normalized HotspotSystem customer or subscriber record.

customers.description: The HotspotSystem customers returned for the current page.

anyOf.description: The current page URL from the Link header.
The next page URL from the Link header when available.
The previous page URL from the Link header when available.
The requested page size parsed from the page links.
The zero-based offset parsed from the current page link.
The zero-based offset for the next page when available.
The zero-based offset for the previous page when available.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata derived from the HotspotSystem Link header.

outputSchema.description: The normalized response returned for HotspotSystem customers.

actions.name: list_location_options
actions.description: List HotspotSystem locations as lightweight id-name options.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing HotspotSystem location options.

locationOptions.description: The HotspotSystem location options returned by the API.
